problems_encountered.description: Initial attempt with @example.com email rejected by API (400). Retried with @mailinator.com and succeeded. API validates email domain authenticity.

tool_response_summary: Successfully sent organization invitation to eval-test-20251219@mailinator.com for organization c0256a2f-ccb0-4e00-b6ed-579bdb758675 with member role. Invite ID: 17678669-cbe6-44ae-82ac-b6c4f88e3a26. Response time: 487.77ms
execution_notes: Tool executed successfully after correcting email domain. Real disposable email domains (mailinator.com) required - example.com domains are rejected by API validation.
